cq-001	pass	1	1 row(s)
cq-002	pass	1	1 row(s)
cq-003	pass	1	1 row(s)
cq-004	pass	1	1 row(s)
cq-005	pass	1	1 row(s)
cq-006	pass	2	2 row(s)
cq-007	pass	2	2 row(s)
cq-008	pass	2	2 row(s)
cq-009	pass	0	0 row(s)
cq-010	pass	1	1 row(s)
cq-011	pass	2	2 row(s)
cq-012	pass	1	1 row(s)
cq-013	pass	1	1 row(s)
cq-014	pass	1	1 row(s)
